characters.description: Kidra's brother, a Winterscar knight, and the wearer of Journey. He is a relic-armored fighter.
characters.name: Keith Winterscar

characters.description: A Feather defector and an ally of Keith.
characters.name: Wrath

characters.description: Keith's father and a Deathless protector.
characters.name: Tenisent

characters.description: Keith's relic armor and combat support system.
characters.name: Journey

characters.description: A remote machine guide who turned away from hunting humans. He helped create the Division Stone and provides a route toward it so an artificial soul can be severed from Relinquished's fractals.
characters.name: Abraxas

characters.description: Abraxas's collaborator in creating the Division Stone with the Mites so artificial souls can be severed from Relinquished's fractals.
characters.name: Suya

characters.description: The machine sovereign who controls the Feathers through unity fractals.
characters.name: Relinquished

characters.description: A former Feather operative and machine adversary believed to be dead before the expedition begins.
characters.name: To’Aacar

characters.description: A Winterscar captain.
characters.name: Sagrius

characters.description: A Deathless clan lord and patron of Winterscar.
characters.name: Atius

characters.description: Keith's sister and a Winterscar ally.
characters.name: Kidra

characters.description: A merchant lord leading a threatened underground convoy. He offers the location of a Mite terminal in exchange for an escort to the Grand Highway.
characters.name: Quath

characters.description: A merchant-convoy officer who commands its hired undersider mercenaries and offers a Mite terminal's location in exchange for an escort to the Grand Highway.
characters.name: Quath's forward captain

characters.description: An active hostile Feather and machine adversary.
characters.name: To’Avalis

characters.description: The Feather previously known as Wrath. She turns Relinquished's approved deception into cover for protecting Keith, then shares the record of her audience with the expedition.
characters.name: To’Wrathh

characters.description: A large Feather present during Relinquished's audience. He remains passive while the other Feathers conceal failures and direct suspicion toward Keith.
characters.name: To’Orda

characters.description: A painted runner known to To’Wrathh who arrives carrying cooking equipment.
characters.name: Yorob

characters.description: A simulated crusader personality within Journey whose hostility toward machines complicates cooperation with Yorob. Journey filters what she perceives so she can continue advising Keith around machine allies.
characters.name: Catheda

characters.description: A separate intelligence generated by Journey to interpret its knowledge through a former crusader's outlook. The model can change as it processes new information, though its personal name is not established.
characters.name: Stored crusader engram within Journey

characters.description: A priest of the Chosen and a leader in the fortified settlement reached by the expedition. He helps represent a community where humans and machines live together.
characters.name: Legis

characters.description: A repaired drake living in the Chosen town, fitted with clean replacement limbs and tail after earlier damage.
characters.name: Fido

characters.description: A former Caprenor soldier who became Deathless and now leads a vendetta against Aura. He holds the settlement responsible for friends killed during the fall of Caprenor.
characters.name: Draconis

characters.description: The Deathless commander previously known as Draconis. Trauma from Caprenor drives his campaign against Aura, where he seeks vengeance for comrades lost in the city's collapse.
characters.name: Lyrian Draconis

characters.description: An older Deathless and mentor to Lyrian Draconis. He supports the force threatening Aura and regards cooperation between humans and machines as unacceptable.
characters.name: Lionheart

characters.description: A former Caprenor operative helping organize Aura's defense. She took part in destroying Caprenor's pillar heart and now works with the settlement's leaders on military problems.
characters.name: Marcella

characters.description: A huge, many-eyed machine concealed behind a waterfall near a Mite fountain. Its speed, heavy weapons, and stealth make it a serious threat even to Keith and Lyrian Draconis in relic armor.
characters.name: Murder Shrimp

characters.description: A trusted intermediary who interprets Silverfur's report about two armored newcomers. He considers the possibility that surviving humans have reached the Grey Roamers extraordinary.
characters.name: Kress

characters.description: A leader or spokesman among the Grey Roamers. He reports that the apparent humans attacked a hostile infestation without turning their weapons on his pack.
characters.name: Silverfur

characters.description: An unnamed Feather who controls long-range cannons through floating plates during To’Orda's attack on the trading outpost.
characters.name: Remote cannon operator

characters.description: A Golden Age ship AI operating an underground starship. It opens a private channel to Keith and Lyrian Draconis and warns them about approaching machines.
characters.name: Icon of Stars
